narrative:
Catawba Island 3 (precinct in Ottawa County) has 1,117 registered voters, with 43.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.5 percentage points.
